title: War-room: add pre-H100 smoke bundle
author: omar07ibrahim

data.description: CPU-only pre-H100 smoke validation helper for record folders, checking Python compile/AST sanity, synthetic sliding-window target coverage, tokenizer metadata NPZ shape/scalar sanity, and artifact byte accounting.

novel_contributions: Adds a CPU-only pre-H100 smoke test helper for validating Parameter Golf record folders
Checks train_gpt.py compile/AST sanity without GPU dependencies
Validates exact synthetic sliding-window target coverage
Validates tokenizer metadata NPZ shape/scalar sanity without importing numpy or torch
Adds decimal 16,000,000-byte artifact accounting with optional trained artifact
Provides a legacy coverage falsification check that intentionally fails on duplicate target coverage
